texto: You don't win by wishing for your competitor or enemy to be weak and broke
autor: you win when you build yourself to be strong and to do the winning job right
explicacao: Citação de you win when you build yourself to be strong and to do the winning job right sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You don't win by wishing for your competitor or enemy to be weak and broke” articula reflexao, hisham-fawzi, wishing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
